title: Invisible Maps
description: Resource pack that adds transparency to maps
body:
The resource pack adds support for transparent map art (with glass). This is especially useful when building such map art.

## Map art **without** a resource pack installed
![Without pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51fc0502ddec43e278d29d3a8559bb236b435f40.png)

## Map art with a resource pack
![With pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56dca24d58a24fb3dd88fbee23a93d36b32ae1d6.png)

To install, simply move the archive to the .minecraft/resourcepacks folder.
